notes: Sync hardening — final wave on the data-loss ticket. Profile bundles now merge per-config: two devices editing different .cfg files in the same profile concurrently both keep their edits (previously last-writer-wins on the whole bundle). Each config carries its own updated_at watermark sourced from file mtime; 409-retry refetches AND remerges so conflicts don't lose either side. Pull respects per-file watermarks, so a fresh local edit isn't clobbered by a stale remote. Backwards compatible with v1 string-keyed bundles. Plus a new Delete-from-cloud button on the Player Data page for manual character cloud removal — auto-propagation from local-disk deletions was deliberately left out (too risky without a UI affirming intent).
